name: remember-the-alamo
description: Remember the Alamo! — Unit 3 Texas History review quiz (TEKS 7.3A/B/C, 7.1B). Answer the whole Texas Revolution to march Sam Houston's army from Gonzales to San Jacinto, over a server-authoritative Socket.IO backend with a live Teacher Command Center.
comment: No npm workspaces: this drive is exFAT, which cannot host the symlinks/junctions workspace linking requires. server/ and client/ install independently; `npm install` here cascades via postinstall.

scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix server --no-fund --no-audit && npm install --prefix client --no-fund --no-audit
